name: web
description: Web frontend skills for Codex, sourced from selected OpenAI Build Web Apps skill directories.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend app, React, shadcn/ui, and browser QA skills.
interface.longDescription: Web groups selected OpenAI Build Web Apps skill surfaces into a scoped plugin for frontend app building, frontend testing and debugging, React and Next.js performance guidance, and shadcn/ui component workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $frontend-app-builder to build a polished frontend.
Use $shadcn to work with shadcn/ui components.
